communication_preferences.notes: Borrower has expressed frustration with repeated document requests on prior loans. Prefers clear, specific instructions with examples.

item.underwriter_notes: January 2026 bank statement shows a $47,200 deposit on 01/18/2026 that does not appear to be from a regular/recurring source. Borrower must provide a signed letter of explanation identifying the source of the deposit, along with supporting documentation (e.g., sale contract, wire confirmation, gift letter if applicable).

previous_attempts.borrower_response: Uploaded a screenshot of a Zelle transfer — no signed letter, no supporting documentation.
previous_attempts.reviewer_action: Rejected. Informed borrower via email that a signed explanation letter is required in addition to the transfer evidence.

timeline_pressure.notes: Rate lock expires April 14. If outstanding items aren't cleared by April 7, closing will likely slip past lock expiration, requiring a lock extension ($1,200 estimated cost to borrower) or renegotiation.
